build.buildCommand: (if [ -d apps/coinet-platform ] && [ ! -f package.json ]; then cd apps/coinet-platform; fi && if [ ! -f package.json ]; then echo "ERROR: package.json not found in $PWD"; ls -la; exit 1; fi && if [ ! -f prisma/schema.prisma ]; then echo "ERROR: prisma/schema.prisma not found in $PWD"; exit 1; fi && echo "Building from: $PWD" && npm install && (DATABASE_URL="postgresql://dummy:dummy@localhost:5432/dummy" npx prisma generate || echo 'Prisma generate skipped') && npm run build)
